title: Sphyrarhynchus amaniense
taxonomy: Sphyrarhynchus amaniense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae, commonly known as the ginger family. This plant is native to Tanzania. The classification of Sphyrarhynchus amaniense reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Zingiberaceae family. Further classification of this plant includes its order (Asparagales), subclass (Commelinidae), and clade (Angiospermophyta). At the most basic level, Sphyrarhynchus amaniense is also classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
